requirement_topic.en: Motor Efficiency Classes (IE Code) — IRAM and IEC Alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 电动机效率等级（IE代码）——IRAM与IEC对齐
requirement_topic.zht: 電動機效率等級（IE代碼）——IRAM與IEC對齊

summary.en: Argentina has adopted IEC 60034-30-1 efficiency classes (IE1–IE4) through IRAM 62404, which aligns the national standard with IEC 60034:2014 principles. The Secretaría de Energía administers the mandatory energy efficiency labelling scheme for motors. IE class definitions follow IEC 60034-30-1:2014 naming conventions. IRAM product certification is the primary conformity route for listed motor categories; INTI provides testing and conformity assessment services. Motors must display their IE class on the nameplate in compliance with the applicable IRAM scheme requirements.
summary.zh: 阿根廷通过IRAM 62404采用了IEC 60034-30-1效率等级（IE1–IE4），使国家标准与IEC 60034:2014原则保持一致。能源秘书处负责管理电机强制能效标识方案。IE等级定义遵循IEC 60034-30-1:2014命名规范。对于列名电机类别，IRAM产品认证是主要合规路径；INTI提供检测和合格评定服务。电机须按适用IRAM方案要求在铭牌上标注其IE等级。
summary.zht: 阿根廷通過IRAM 62404採用了IEC 60034-30-1效率等級（IE1–IE4），使國家標準與IEC 60034:2014原則保持一致。能源秘書處負責管理電機強制能效標識方案。IE等級定義遵循IEC 60034-30-1:2014命名規範。對於列名電機類別，IRAM產品認證是主要合規路徑；INTI提供檢測和合格評定服務。電機須按適用IRAM方案要求在銘牌上標注其IE等級。

standards_or_laws: Secretaría de Energía — mandatory energy efficiency labelling scheme

summary.en: China uses GB 18613-2020 which defines efficiency grades Grade 1 (= IE5), Grade 2 (= IE4), and Grade 3 (= IE3 mandatory minimum). The naming convention differs from IEC 60034-30-1 in that GB 18613 uses numbered grades rather than IE codes, though the underlying efficiency thresholds reference IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (Ed.1, IE1-IE4) class definitions. CCC certification is not mandatory for most general industrial three-phase AC motors.
summary.zh: 中国使用GB 18613-2020，定义了1级（= IE5）、2级（= IE4）和3级（= IE3，法定最低）能效等级。命名规范与IEC 60034-30-1有所不同，GB 18613使用数字等级而非IE代码，但基础效率门槛参考了IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (Ed.1, IE1-IE4)等级定义。对大多数一般工业三相交流电机，CCC认证不是强制要求。
summary.zht: 中國使用GB 18613-2020，定義了1級（= IE5）、2級（= IE4）和3級（= IE3，法定最低）能效等級。命名規範與IEC 60034-30-1有所不同，GB 18613使用數字等級而非IE代碼，但基礎效率門檻參考了IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (Ed.1, IE1-IE4)等級定義。對大多數一般工業三相交流電機，CCC認證不是強制要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (mandatory energy efficiency grades for three-phase motors)
IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (Ed.1, IE1-IE4) (referenced basis for GB 18613 grade values)

gap.en: Both Argentina (via IRAM 62404) and China (via GB 18613-2020) reference IEC 60034-30-1:2014 IE class definitions, creating nominal alignment in class naming. However, IRAM certification must be obtained from an IRAM-authorised body; CCC certification is not recognised in Argentina. The IRAM scheme requires local certification and potentially INTI testing — Chinese factory test reports are not automatically accepted. Nameplate marking conventions may also differ in format from Chinese practice.
gap.zh: 阿根廷（通过IRAM 62404）和中国（通过GB 18613-2020）均参考IEC 60034-30-1:2014 IE等级定义，在等级命名上名义对齐。但IRAM认证须通过IRAM授权机构获得；CCC认证在阿根廷不被认可。IRAM方案要求本地认证，可能还需INTI检测——中国工厂检测报告不被自动接受。铭牌标注规范在格式上也可能与中国实践有所不同。
gap.zht: 阿根廷（通過IRAM 62404）和中國（通過GB 18613-2020）均參考IEC 60034-30-1:2014 IE等級定義，在等級命名上名義對齊。但IRAM認證須通過IRAM授權機構獲得；CCC認證在阿根廷不被認可。IRAM方案要求本地認證，可能還需INTI檢測——中國工廠檢測報告不被自動接受。銘牌標注規範在格式上也可能與中國實踐有所不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IRAM certification required for listed motor categories; energy efficiency labelling mandatory under Secretaría de Energía scheme
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 is a compulsory national standard enforced by SAMR from 2021-06-01; CCC not required for most general industrial motors

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A motor bearing only GB 18613-2020 certification and CCC (where applicable) is not automatically compliant with Argentina's IRAM certification scheme. Exporters must obtain IRAM product certification (or a recognised Certificado de Homologación) and ensure the motor meets the IE class requirements under IRAM 62404 as verified by an IRAM-authorised or INTI-accredited laboratory. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有GB 18613-2020认证及CCC（如适用）的电机不能自动视为符合阿根廷IRAM认证方案。出口商须获得IRAM产品认证（或认可的Certificado de Homologación），并确保电机经IRAM授权或INTI认可实验室核实后符合IRAM 62404下的IE等级要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有GB 18613-2020認證及CCC（如適用）的電機不能自動視為符合阿根廷IRAM認證方案。出口商須獲得IRAM產品認證（或認可的Certificado de Homologación），並確保電機經IRAM授權或INTI認可實驗室核實後符合IRAM 62404下的IE等級要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Efficiency Test Method — IRAM / IEC 60034-2-1 Basis
requirement_topic.zh: 效率测试方法——IRAM / IEC 60034-2-1基础
requirement_topic.zht: 效率測試方法——IRAM / IEC 60034-2-1基礎

summary.en: Under the IRAM certification scheme aligned with IEC 60034, efficiency measurement is expected to follow IEC 60034-2-1 or an equivalent method that produces reliable, accurate and reproducible results. INTI laboratories apply IEC-aligned test protocols for motor conformity assessment in Argentina. Test reports from non-INTI or non-IRAM-accredited laboratories may not be accepted without equivalence documentation. Declared efficiency values must be supported by traceable test evidence.
summary.zh: 在与IEC 60034对齐的IRAM认证方案下，效率测量预计遵循IEC 60034-2-1或能产生可靠、准确且可重现结果的等效方法。INTI实验室在阿根廷电机合规评定中采用与IEC对齐的测试规程。来自非INTI或非IRAM认可实验室的测试报告，若无等效性文件，可能不被接受。声明的效率值须有可溯源的测试证据支持。
summary.zht: 在與IEC 60034對齊的IRAM認證方案下，效率測量預計遵循IEC 60034-2-1或能產生可靠、準確且可重複結果的等效方法。INTI實驗室在阿根廷電機合規評定中採用與IEC對齊的測試規程。來自非INTI或非IRAM認可實驗室的測試報告，若無等效性文件，可能不被接受。聲明的效率值須有可溯源的測試證據支持。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60034-2-1 (efficiency and loss determination — basis for IRAM-aligned testing)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 1032-2012 as the primary test standard for three-phase induction motor efficiency, referenced by GB 18613-2020. GB/T 1032 and IEC 60034-2-1 are substantially harmonised but differ in stray-load-loss treatment — GB/T 1032 permits assumed stray-load losses in some methods, whereas IEC 60034-2-1 requires measured values. Chinese test reports issued under GB/T 1032 alone may not satisfy INTI or IRAM requirements without a documented equivalence justification.
summary.zh: 中国以GB/T 1032-2012为三相感应电机效率测试的主要标准，由GB 18613-2020引用。GB/T 1032与IEC 60034-2-1基本协调，但在杂散负载损耗处理上有所不同——GB/T 1032部分方法允许假定杂散负载损耗，而IEC 60034-2-1要求实测。仅依据GB/T 1032出具的中国测试报告，若无书面等效性论证，可能无法满足INTI或IRAM要求。
summary.zht: 中國以GB/T 1032-2012為三相感應電機效率測試的主要標準，由GB 18613-2020引用。GB/T 1032與IEC 60034-2-1基本協調，但在雜散負載損耗處理上有所不同——GB/T 1032部分方法允許假定雜散負載損耗，而IEC 60034-2-1要求實測。僅依據GB/T 1032出具的中國測試報告，若無書面等效性論證，可能無法滿足INTI或IRAM要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 1032-2012 (三相异步电动机试验方法)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 1032-based test reports may not be automatically accepted by INTI or IRAM-authorised labs without equivalence justification, due to differences in stray-load-loss treatment relative to IEC 60034-2-1. Exporters should confirm whether INTI accepts IEC 60034-2-1-compliant reports from accredited third-party laboratories, or whether re-testing at an INTI facility is required for IRAM certification.
gap.zh: 由于杂散负载损耗处理方式与IEC 60034-2-1存在差异，基于GB/T 1032的中国测试报告可能无法在没有等效性论证的情况下被INTI或IRAM授权实验室自动接受。出口商应确认INTI是否接受经认可第三方实验室依据IEC 60034-2-1出具的报告，或是否需要在INTI设施重新测试以获得IRAM认证。
gap.zht: 由於雜散負載損耗處理方式與IEC 60034-2-1存在差異，基於GB/T 1032的中國測試報告可能無法在沒有等效性論證的情況下被INTI或IRAM授權實驗室自動接受。出口商應確認INTI是否接受經認可第三方實驗室依據IEC 60034-2-1出具的報告，或是否需要在INTI設施重新測試以獲得IRAM認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IRAM certification requires test evidence meeting IEC-aligned protocols; INTI is the primary conformity assessment body
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory reference — GB/T 1032-2012 referenced by compulsory GB 18613-2020; test method harmonised but not identical to IEC 60034-2-1

source.publisher: INTI — Instituto Nacional de Tecnología Industrial

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese test reports under GB/T 1032 alone may be insufficient for IRAM certification in Argentina without equivalence documentation. Engaging an INTI-accredited or IRAM-authorised laboratory for IEC 60034-2-1 aligned testing is the common recommended path. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅凭GB/T 1032出具的中国测试报告，若无等效性文件，可能不足以在阿根廷获得IRAM认证。委托INTI认可或IRAM授权实验室进行符合IEC 60034-2-1的测试是通常推荐的路径。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅憑GB/T 1032出具的中國測試報告，若無等效性文件，可能不足以在阿根廷獲得IRAM認證。委託INTI認可或IRAM授權實驗室進行符合IEC 60034-2-1的測試是通常推薦的路徑。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。
